name: New England Boiled Dinner/cp
recipeInstructions:
1. Place corned beef and water in the Crock Pot Cooker.
2. Cover and set to high heat.
3. When steaming vigorously, reduce heat to medium and continue cooking for 2.5 hours.
4. Remove the meat from the cooker.
5. Add potatoes, turnips, carrots, and cabbage to the cooker.
6. Place the meat on top of the vegetables.
7. Cover and set to medium heat.
8. Cook until the mixture is steaming briskly for 45 minutes.
9. Ham may be used in place of corned beef if desired.
